hero.name: Kyle
hero.title: Business Analyst
hero.subtitle: Global experience across China, London, and the U.S.

about.headline: Understanding data. Interpreting people.
about.paragraph1: I studied business analytics and computer science, but what I actually do feels more like trying to make sense of how the world works.
about.paragraph2: Spending time in China, London, and the U.S. let me see how people make decisions differently. It got me thinking about what data really helps us understand.
about.paragraph3: You can call me Kyle, though most friends call me Shock. It comes from how my Chinese name sounds. Outside of work, I like getting out of familiar places—it helps me reset. I also enjoy cooking and playing basketball, just keeping life from feeling too one-dimensional.

items.focus: Focused on statistical modeling, machine learning, and optimization for business decision-making.
items.curriculum: Coursework includes SQL and data management, statistical foundations (R/Python), and machine learning for decision making.
items.application: Also covers business fundamentals and customer analytics, applying data to real-world business problems.
items.courses: Machine Learning, Prescriptive Modeling, Customer & Competitive Analytics, Forecasting & Time Series, Data Visualization
Data Management & Analytics, Linear Algebra, Statistics, Econometrics

bullets: Queried and reconciled 100+ route and pricing records in SQL, reducing billing discrepancies by 18%
Resolved 15+ weekly cross-system inconsistencies, improving reporting accuracy and reducing reconciliation delays
Optimized data update workflows, reducing manual correction time by 20% and increasing data reliability
Monitored 5–8 UX metrics including drop-off rate and feature adoption via Tableau and Power BI
Benchmarked digital onboarding experiences against 2–3 global peers on flow complexity and interaction design
Supported product initiatives by documenting requirements and tracking action items in Jira and Confluence
Supported two Fortune 500 client engagements, conducting 15+ expert interviews in the pharmaceutical sector
Synthesized Voice of Customer findings into structured research notes to support client deliverables
Built a research database of 26 healthcare companies by extracting financial data from annual reports
Identified high-growth investment targets by benchmarking revenue growth and profitability across 80+ companies
Modeled the financial performance of a travel-tech platform using CCA to support PE decision-making
Developed market analysis for a travel-tech platform to support business plan and client pitch deck
Built Excel financial models to evaluate ROI across 15+ Hawaii short-term rental properties
Assessed market performance by researching 5+ leading platforms including Redfin in Excel
Developed scenario-based projections in Excel to support data-driven short-term rental investment decisions

items.title: E-Commerce Customer Segmentation
items.context: K-means clustering and RFM analysis across 500K+ customers to enable precision-targeted campaigns.
items.description: Applied K-means clustering and RFM analysis to segment 500K+ customers, enabling targeted marketing campaigns that lifted conversion rates by 23% and reduced churn among high-value segments.

items.title: Supply Chain Optimization Dashboard
items.context: Real-time KPI monitoring across a global supply chain, surfacing 15+ risk bottlenecks automatically.
items.description: Built an interactive Power BI dashboard to monitor real-time KPIs across a global supply chain network, cutting reporting time from 3 days to under 2 hours and flagging 15+ risk bottlenecks.

items.title: Financial News Sentiment Analysis
items.context: BERT fine-tuned on 100K+ articles, integrated into a live stock screening tool.
items.description: Fine-tuned a BERT-based NLP model on 100K+ financial news articles to classify market sentiment. Achieved 78% test accuracy and integrated predictions into a live stock screening tool.

categories.name: Analytics & Data
categories.statement: Turning messy data into clear decisions.

categories.name: Development
categories.statement: Building the tools that bring ideas to life.

categories.name: Languages
categories.statement: Thinking across cultures, not just borders.

items.title: Travel
items.label: Lifestyle & Exploration
items.punchline: Exploring the world, on and off the map.
items.description: I've traveled across 13 countries, experiencing different cultures and perspectives. These journeys shape how I approach data, people, and decisions.

items.title: Sports
items.description: Basketball, tennis, climbing, surfing, and skiing — I enjoy sports that challenge both focus and adaptability.

items.title: Gaming
items.description: I play esports games that require fast decision-making, strategy, and teamwork under pressure.

items.title: Cooking
items.description: I cook both Chinese and Western dishes. Cooking is where structure meets creativity.

items.caption: Let go, and trust the fall.
Standing where the sky feels closer.
Slowing down, just enough to notice.

footer.contact_sub: Open to internships, research collaborations, and interesting conversations.
